summary: Implemented speed optimizations to handle high volume of passenger orders more efficiently: 1) Increased message length filtering (minimum 10 chars, maximum 200 chars), 2) Enhanced emoji-only message filtering to ignore non-meaningful content, 3) Reduced rate limiting delays from 0.3s to 0.1s for advertising groups and 0.1s to 0.05s for additional groups to speed up order distribution, and 4) Improved text cleaning to filter out very short messages that are likely not real orders.
current_status: The system is now optimized for faster order processing and better filtering of irrelevant messages. This should reduce the load from meaningless messages while speeding up the distribution of legitimate passenger orders to all connected groups, improving overall system performance and reducing spam.
